cart.title: Requisition Trolley
cart.addBillingAddressPrompt: Please add a research funding address to proceed with your acquisition requisition.
cart.howToPay: Select your preferred funding disbursement method?
cart.zeroCreditCards: You have 0 Monetary Transfer Devices registered
cart.addCardPrompt: To register a Monetary Transfer Device, please activate the Add New Monetary Transfer Device apparatus.
cart.noUnpaidInvoices: No outstanding funding requisition documents detected.
cart.thankYouForOrder: The laboratory thanks you for your contribution to SCIENCE!
cart.paymentActivationPrompt: Please remit funding for laboratory apparatus activation. Upon funding receipt, your apparatus will be immediately activated and operational!
cart.bankPaymentNote: After funding transfer is completed, open a laboratory incident report with the transaction identifier, date, and amount disbursed. We will manually process the funding credit.

creditCard.name: Cardholder Designation
creditCard.verifyIntroStep1: Verification is required before your Monetary Transfer Device can be deployed. InterServer will administer two micro-charges under $1.00 each to your device.
creditCard.verifyBillingStatement: These charges will appear on your funding statement within approximately 2 minutes, typically under pending transactions. If these charges are not detected, contact your Monetary Transfer Device issuer for diagnostic assistance.
creditCard.verifyVoidNotice: These authorization micro-charges are for verification purposes only and will be voided within 3-5 solar cycles, depending on your financial institution.
creditCard.acceptTempCharges: I authorize two temporary micro-charges under $1.00 each.
creditCard.verifyBankLogin: Authenticate with your Monetary Transfer Device's online banking portal or contact your financial institution to confirm the two micro-charges administered. They often appear under Pending Charges. These authorization charges will dematerialize within approximately 3-5 solar cycles.
creditCard.enterAmountsPrompt: Please enter the two micro-charge amounts administered to your Monetary Transfer Device. Values must be in USD.
creditCard.currencyNote: Please note that the charges on your Monetary Transfer Device statement may appear in a different monetary unit from the one required on the final confirmation protocol described above. If your statement does not display the original transaction amounts in the required monetary unit, contact your financial institution. They should be able to provide the amounts of the two micro-charges in the original monetary unit.
creditCard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to terminate your Monetary Transfer Device {card}?
creditCard.verifiedTooltip: This device has been authenticated and activated for use in the laboratory system.
creditCard.notVerifiedTooltip: Authenticate the Monetary Transfer Device first
creditCard.enableCardTooltip: Activate this Monetary Transfer Device for laboratory use.

pay.title: Remit Funding Requisition Documents
pay.autoRedirect: You will be automatically redirected to the funding apparatus.

paymentSuccess.title: Funding Acquisition: SUCCESSFUL!
paymentSuccess.thankYou: The laboratory thanks you for your contribution to SCIENCE! Your transaction has been completed with outstanding success.
paymentSuccess.goToDashboard: Proceed to Primary Laboratory Control Center

paymentTypes.title: Funding Disbursement Methods
paymentTypes.ccNote: All Monetary Transfer Devices must be authenticated before deployment. To authenticate them, activate the "Authenticate" apparatus.
paymentTypes.deleteInvoiceConfirm: Are you sure you want to eradicate funding requisition document {id}?

prepays.title: Pre-allocated Research Budget
prepays.noHistoryFound: No historical data detected in apparatus!
prepays.showingPage: Displaying page {page} of {totalPages} containing {records} records out of {totalRecords} total
prepays.autoUseNewInvoices: Automatically apply to new funding requisitions
prepays.deletePrepayConfirm: Are you sure you want to eradicate pre-allocation #{id} and its associated historical log?
